Concept: Remanufacture Scrap

Creator

Description

This is scrap from the remanufacturing process.

Usage List:

  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Recover Materials/Devices in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Remanufacture in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Remanufacture Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Recycle in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Pretreat Battery in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Mechanically/Chemically Pretreat Material in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Pyrometallurgy in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
  • Appears as Remanufacture Scrap in Diagram Prepare Battery for Remanufacturing in in Treat Traction Lithium Batteries at End-of-Life.
